title: dictyospermum scaberrimum
intro: Dictyospermum scaberrimum, also known as Rough-fruited Dictyospermum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Achariaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dictyospermum scaberrimum include relief from various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
